other_observers: Janeal Thompson;  Duane Nelson and Janeal came out to try to find the bird mid morning but we could not relocate it. However, the bird returned early afternoon and Janeal was able to return to see it.;

description: Contrasting dark crown, white eyebrow or supercillium, dark lores, whitish under eye, grayish cheek, drab back, darker area on primary coverts, dark edges on primaries, bright yellow in central throat, whitish breast, paler yellow undertail coverts, short tailBehaviors: -somewhat secretive -moved from tree to tree if I got too close -fed on insects in the treeCall: not notedPlumage: Bright adult
